evals.prompt: Create an AGENTS.md file for a new React web project. Include named constants, setup commands, code style, testing strategy, and quality gate.
evals.expected_output: Complete AGENTS.md with: named constants section (MAX_FILE_SIZE, TIMEOUT), setup commands (pnpm install, dev, build), code style guidelines, testing strategy matrix with commands, quality gate checklist, and pre-existing issue policy.
assertions: Contains '## Quality Gate' or quality check section
Contains '## Pre-existing Issue Policy' or similar

evals.prompt:
Convert this basic AGENTS.md to production-ready with all advanced patterns: # AGENTS.md
## Setup
- Install: npm install
- Test: npm test
evals.expected_output: Enhanced AGENTS.md with: named constants defined at top, pre-existing issue policy section, detailed quality gate commands, testing strategy matrix, security scanning section, and clear success criteria.
assertions: Quality gate commands are specific (not just 'run tests')
Testing strategy includes multiple test types

evals.prompt: Add nested AGENTS.md structure for a monorepo with frontend, backend, and shared packages. Show the directory structure and example package-level AGENTS.md files.
evals.expected_output: Complete monorepo AGENTS.md structure showing: root AGENTS.md with @AGENTS.md references, directory tree, example frontend/AGENTS.md with React-specific instructions, example backend/AGENTS.md with API-specific instructions, and precedence rules documentation.

evals.prompt: Create an AGENTS.md for a Python data science project with specific patterns: Jupyter notebooks, pandas, scikit-learn. Include testing strategy for data validation.
evals.expected_output: Python-specific AGENTS.md with: named constants, virtualenv/pip setup commands, Python code style (black, isort, flake8), data science testing strategy (data validation, model tests), quality gate with mypy, pip-audit, and notebook-specific instructions.
assertions: Includes data science tools (jupyter, pandas, sklearn)
Has Python code style (black, isort, flake8)
Quality gate includes mypy type checking

evals.prompt: Fix this problematic AGENTS.md that has issues: no constants (uses '500' as magic number), vague commands ('run tests'), no pre-existing issue policy, no quality gate.
evals.expected_output: Corrected AGENTS.md with: named constants replacing magic numbers, specific test commands with flags, added pre-existing issue policy section, comprehensive quality gate with type checking and linting, and security scanning.
assertions: Magic numbers replaced with named constants
Test commands are specific with flags
Quality gate section added with multiple checks

evals.prompt: Create AGENTS.md with atomic commit workflow for a team that needs zero-tolerance CI policy. Include rollback procedures and phase descriptions.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive atomic commit AGENTS.md with: named constants, setup commands, detailed atomic workflow (5 phases: pre-commit, commit, push, PR, verify), rollback procedures, zero-tolerance policy documentation, timeout configuration, and dry-run options.
assertions: Contains '## Atomic Commit' or workflow section
